data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Full test suite results — Python Skill/Doc Tests: 591 passed, 2 deselected (known exclusions). All 37 implementation-plan Python tests pass. Evals: 52 passed, 0 failed. One pre-existing bash test failure (test-discover-agents.sh, 42 pass / 1 fail) — unrelated to implementation-plan. AC self-check: (1) python3 -m pytest implementation-plan tests: 37/37 PASS. (2) bash tests/run-all.sh: Python suite PASS, run was interrupted by user at exit 137 but all relevant suites completed successfully. No changes needed — all assertions are compatible with current SKILL.md structure.
